Business: JSW Holdings Limited, a non-banking financial company, primarily engages in investing and financing activities in India. The company grants loans; provides securities, as well as invests in securities. JSW Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Mumbai, India.

  Current: 16.13  (+3.60% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
